name: Awesome-Item-ID-Gen-RecSys
description: Updating curated list of research advancements on item identification and item tokenization in generative recommender systems. The survey is titled "A Survey of Item Identifiers in Generative Recommendation: Construction, Alignment, and Generation"

readme_html:
📌 Pinned

We are actively tracking the latest research and will keep maintaining and updating the repository. We also highly welcome contributions to our repository and survey paper. If your studies are relevant, please feel free to create an issue or a pull request.

Survey Paper: A Survey of Item Identifiers in Generative Recommendation: Construction, Alignment, and Generation

ReseachGate TechRxiv

Contents

  • Contents
  • 📑 Paper List
    • 🦄 Creation of Item IDs
      • Types of Item IDs
        • Numeric IDs
        • Textual IDs
        • Multi-facet IDs
        • Semantic IDs
      • SID Tokenization
        • Cluster-based Tokenizers
        • Codebook-based Tokenizers
        • Other Tokenizers
        • Augmentation
    • 👫 Alignment of Item IDs
      • Alignment in LLM-as-Gen-RecSys
        • Collaborative Alignment
        • Multi-Modal Alignment
      • Alignment in SID-based Gen-RecSys
        • Multi-Task Training
        • Joint Training
        • Others
    • 🔮 Generation of Next Item IDs
      • Validity-Aware Generation
        • Direct Generation (DG)
        • Closed-Set Generation (CSG)
        • Post-Grounding (PG)
        • Constrained Decoding (CD)
      • Decoding Acceleration
        • Speculative Decoding (SD)
        • Pruned Search (PS)
        • Parallel Decoding (PD)
        • General Optimizations (GO)
    • 🗂️ Benchmarks and Datasets

📑 Paper List

🦄 Creation of Item IDs

Types of Item IDs

Numeric IDs
  • (P5) Recommendation as Language Processing (RLP): A Unified Pretrain, Personalized Prompt & Predict Paradigm (P5). RecSys 2022. [paper][code]
  • (E4SRec) E4SRec: An Elegant Effective Efficient Extensible Solution of Large Language Models for Sequential Recommendation. arXiv 2023. [paper][code]
  • (CID) How to Index Item IDs for Recommendation Foundation Models. SIGIR 2023. [paper][code]
  • (PAP-Rec) Pap-rec: Personalized automatic prompt for recommendation language model. arXiv 2024. [paper][code]
  • (SID-Token) Better Generalization with Semantic Ids: A Case Study in Ranking for Recommendations. RecSys 2024. [paper]
  • (A-LLMRec) Large language models meet collaborative filtering: An efficient all-round llm-based recommender system. KDD 2024. [paper][code]
Textual IDs
  • (PALR) Palr: Personalization aware llms for recommendation. arXiv 2023. [paper]
  • (PBNR) Pbnr: Prompt-based news recommender system. arXiv 2023. [paper]
  • (BookGPT) Bookgpt: A general framework for book recommendation empowered by large language model. Electronics 2023. [paper][code]
  • (ChatGPT-News) A preliminary study of chatgpt on news recommendation: Personalization, provider fairness, fake news. arXiv 2023. [paper][code]
  • (LLMRank) Large language models are zero-shot rankers for recommender systems. ECIR 2024. [paper][code]
  • (GenRec) Genrec: Large language model for generative recommendation. ECIR 2024. [paper][code]
  • (LLaRA) LLaRA: Large Language-Recommendation Assistant. SIGIR 2024. [paper][code]
  • (BIGRec) A Bi-Step Grounding Paradigm for Large Language Models in Recommendation Systems. TORS 2025. [paper][code]
  • (Instruct-Rec) Recommendation as Instruction Following: A Large Language Model Empowered Recommendation Approach. TOIS 2025. [paper]
Multi-facet IDs
  • (Chat-REC) Chat-REC: Towards Interactive and Explainable LLMs-Augmented Recommender System. arXiv 2023. [paper]
  • (TransRec) Bridging Items and Language: A Transition Paradigm for Large Language Model-based Recommendation. KDD 2024. [paper] [code]
  • (CLLM4Rec) Collaborative Large Language Model for Recommender Systems. WWW 2024. [paper] [code]
  • (LLM4POI) Large language models for next point-of-interest recommendation. arXiv 2024. [paper]
  • (ID-Lang-Barrier) Break the ID-Language Barrier: An Adaption Framework for Sequential Recommendation. arXiv 2024. [paper]
  • (GNPR-SID) Generative next POI Recommendation with Semantic ID KDD 2025. [paper][code]
  • (CoLLM) CoLLM: Integrating Collaborative Embeddings into Large Language Models for Recommendation. TKDE 2025. [paper] [code]
  • (URM) Large Language Model as Universal Retriever in Industrial-Scale Recommender System. arXiv 2025. [paper]
Semantic IDs
  • (VQ-Rec) Learning vector-quantized item representation for transferable sequential recommenders. WWW 2023. [paper][code]
  • (Tiger) Recommender Systems with Generative Retrieval. NeurIPS 2023. [paper] [code]
  • (ColaRec) Content-Based Collaborative Generation for Recommender Systems. CIKM 2024. [paper][code]
  • (LETTER) Learnable Item Tokenization for Generative Recommendation. CIKM 2024. [paper][code]
  • (EAGER) EAGER: Two-Stream Generative Recommender with Behavior-Semantic Collaboration. KDD 2024. [paper][code]
  • (MMGRec) MMGRec: Multimodal Generative Recommendation with Transformer Model. arXiv 2024. [paper]
  • (OneRec) OneRec: Unifying Retrieve and Rank with Generative Recommender and Iterative Preference Alignment. arXiv 2025. [paper][code]
  • (UTGRec) Universal Item Tokenization for Transferable Generative Recommendation. arXiv 2025. [paper][code]
  • (RPG) Generating Long Semantic Ids in Parallel for Recommendation. KDD 2025. [paper][code]
  • (FORGE) FORGE: Forming Semantic Identifiers for Generative Retrieval in Industrial Datasets. arXiv 2025. [paper][code]
  • (PLUM) PLUM: Adapting Pre-trained Language Models for Industrial-scale Generative Recommendations. arXiv 2025. [paper]

SID Tokenization

Cluster-based Tokenizers
  • (CID) How to Index Item IDs for Recommendation Foundation Models. SIGIR 2023. [paper] [code]
  • (SEATER) Generative Retrieval with Semantic Tree-Structured Item Identifiers via Contrastive Learning. arXiv 2023. [paper] [code]
  • (ColaRec) Content-Based Collaborative Generation for Recommender Systems. CIKM 2024. [paper][code]
  • (EAGER) EAGER: Two-Stream Generative Recommender with Behavior-Semantic Collaboration. KDD 2024. [paper][code]
  • (MERGE) MERGE: Next-Generation Item Indexing Paradigm for Large-Scale Streaming Recommendation [paper]
Codebook-based Tokenizers
  • (VQ-Rec) Learning vector-quantized item representation for transferable sequential recommenders. WWW 2023. [paper][code]
  • (Tiger) Recommender Systems with Generative Retrieval. NeurIPS 2023. [paper] [code]
  • (CoST) CoST: Contrastive Quantization Based Semantic Tokenization for Generative Recommendation RecSys 2024. [paper]
  • (MBGen) Multi-Behavior Generative Recommendation CIKM 2024 [paper] [code]
  • (LMIndexer) Language Models as Semantic Indexers [paper][code]
  • (UIST) Discrete Semantic Tokenization for Deep CTR Prediction WWW 2024 [paper] [code]
  • (ETEGRec) Generative Recommender with End-to-End Learnable Item Tokenization SIGIR 2025 [paper] [code]
  • (COBRA) Sparse Meets Dense: Unified Generative Recommendations with Cascaded Sparse-Dense Representations arXiv 2025. [paper]
  • (BBQRec) BBQRec: Behavior-Bind Quantization for Multi-Modal Sequential Recommendation arXiv 2025. [paper]
  • (UTGRec) Universal Item Tokenization for Transferable Generative Recommendation. arXiv 2025. [paper][code]
  • (DiscRec) DiscRec: Disentangled Semantic-Collaborative Modeling for Generative Recommendation. arXiv 2025. [paper] [code]
  • (MMQ) MMQ: Multimodal Mixture-of-Quantization Tokenization for Semantic ID Generation and User Behavioral Adaptation WSDM 2026 [paper]
  • (DQ-VAE) Representation Quantization for Collaborative Filtering Augmentation [paper]
  • (HiD-VAE) HiD-VAE: Interpretable Generative Recommendation via Hierarchical and Disentangled Semantic IDs. arXiv 2025. [paper]
  • (OneLoc) OneLoc: Geo-Aware Generative Recommender Systems for Local Life Service arXiv 2025. [paper]
  • (PCR-CA) PCR-CA: Parallel Codebook Representations with Contrastive Alignment for Multiple-Category App Recommendation arXiv 2025 [paper]
  • (COSETTE) Closing the Performance Gap in Generative Recommenders with Collaborative Tokenization and Efficient Modeling arXiv 2025 [paper]
  • (PSRQ) Progressive Semantic Residual Quantization for Multimodal-Joint Interest Modeling in Music Recommendation CIKM 2025 [paper]
  • (OneSearch) Onesearch: A preliminary exploration of the unified end-to-end generative framework for e-commerce search arXiv 2025 [paper]
  • (MMQ-v2) MMQ-v2: Align, Denoise, and Amplify: Adaptive Behavior Mining for Semantic IDs Learning in Recommendation arXiv 2025 [paper]
  • (STORE) The Best of the Two Worlds: Harmonizing Semantic and Hash IDs for Sequential Recommendation arXiv 2025[paper]
  • (ReaSeq) ReaSeq: Unleashing World Knowledge via Reasoning for Sequential Modeling arXiv 2025 [paper]
  • (HiGR) HiGR: Efficient Generative Slate Recommendation via Hierarchical Planning and Multi-Objective Preference Alignment [paper]
  • (S²GR) S²GR: Stepwise Semantic-Guided Reasoning in Latent Space for Generative Recommendation arXiv 2026 [paper]
  • (TRM) Farewell to Item IDs: Unlocking the Scaling Potential of Large Ranking Models via Semantic Tokens arXiv 2026 [paper]
  • (GR2) Generative Reasoning Re-ranker arXiv 2026 [paper]
  • (PIT) PIT: A Dynamic Personalized Item Tokenizer for End-to-End Generative Recommendation arXiv 2026 [paper]
  • (HiSAC) HiSAC: Hierarchical Sparse Activation Compression for Ultra-long Sequence Modeling in Recommenders arXiv 2026 [paper]
  • (RQ-GMM) RQ-GMM: Residual Quantized Gaussian Mixture Model for Multimodal Semantic Discretization in CTR Prediction arXiv 2026 [paper]
Other Tokenizers
  • (GPTRec) Generative Sequential Recommendation with GPTRec. Gen-IR @ SIGIR 2023 workshop [paper]
  • (IDGenRec) IDGenRec: LLM-RecSys Alignment with Textual ID Learning SIGIR 2024 [paper] [code]
  • (ActionPiece) ActionPiece: Contextually Tokenizing Action Sequences for Generative Recommendation ICML 2025 [paper] [code]
  • (SETRec) Order-Agnostic Identifier for Large Language Model-based Generative Recommendation. SIGIR 2025. [paper] [code]
Augmentation
  • (MMGRec) MMGRec: Multimodal Generative Recommendation with Transformer Model. arXiv 2024. [paper]
  • (LETTER) Learnable Item Tokenization for Generative Recommendation. CIKM 2024. [paper][code]
  • (DiscRec) DiscRec: Disentangled Semantic-Collaborative Modeling for Generative Recommendation. arXiv 2025. [paper] [code]
  • (COSETTE) Closing the Performance Gap in Generative Recommenders with Collaborative Tokenization and Efficient Modeling arXiv 2025 [paper]
  • (PSRQ) Progressive Semantic Residual Quantization for Multimodal-Joint Interest Modeling in Music Recommendation CIKM 2025 [paper]
  • (OneSearch) Onesearch: A preliminary exploration of the unified end-to-end generative framework for e-commerce search arXiv 2025 [paper]
  • (MMQ) MMQ: Multimodal Mixture-of-Quantization Tokenization for Semantic ID Generation and User Behavioral Adaptation WSDM 2026 [paper]
  • (MMQ-v2) MMQ-v2: Align, Denoise, and Amplify: Adaptive Behavior Mining for Semantic IDs Learning in Recommendation arXiv 2025 [paper]
  • (DoS) DOS: Dual-Flow Orthogonal Semantic IDs for Recommendation in Meituan arXiv 2026 [paper]
  • (QuaSID) Stop Treating Collisions Equally: Qualification-Aware Semantic ID Learning for Recommendation at Industrial Scale arXiv 2026 [paper]

👫 Alignment of Item IDs

Alignment in LLM-as-Gen-RecSys

Collaborative Alignment
  • (E4SRec) E4SRec: An Elegant Effective Efficient Extensible Solution of Large Language Models for Sequential Recommendation. arXiv 2023. [paper] [code]
  • (CLLM4Rec) Collaborative Large Language Model for Recommender Systems. WWW 2024. [paper] [code]
  • (LC-Rec) Adapting Large Language Models by Integrating Collaborative Semantics for Recommendation. ICDE 2024. [paper] [code]
  • (LLaRA) LLaRA: Large Language-Recommendation Assistant. SIGIR 2024. [paper] [code]
  • (A-LLMRec) Large Language Models meet Collaborative Filtering: An Efficient All-round LLM-based Recommender System. KDD 2024. [paper] [code]
  • (IDLE-Adapter) Break the ID-Language Barrier: An Adaption Framework for Sequential Recommendation. arXiv 2024. [paper]
  • (EAGER-LLM) EAGER-LLM: Enhancing Large Language Models as Recommenders through Exogenous Behavior-Semantic Integration. WWW 2025. [paper]
  • (CoLLM) CoLLM: Integrating Collaborative Embeddings into Large Language Models for Recommendation. TKDE 2025. [paper] [code]
  • (Align³GR) Align³GR: Unified Multi-Level Alignment for LLM-based Generative Recommendation. AAAI 2026. [paper]
Multi-Modal Alignment
  • (I-LLMRec) Image is All You Need: Towards Efficient and Effective Large Language Model-based Recommender Systems. arXiv 2025. [paper] [code]

Alignment in SID-based Gen-RecSys

Multi-Task Training
  • (ColaRec) Content-Based Collaborative Generation for Recommender Systems. CIKM 2024. [paper][code]
  • (MBGen) Multi-Behavior Generative Recommendation CIKM 2024 [paper] [code]
  • (Eager) Eager: Two-stream Generative Recommender with Behavior-semantic Collaboration KDD 2024. [paper]
  • (SemanticConvergence) Semantic Convergence: Harmonizing Recommender Systems via Two-stage Alignment and Behavioral Semantic Tokenization AAAI 2025 [paper]
Joint Training
  • (IDGenRec) IDGenRec: LLM-RecSys Alignment with Textual ID Learning SIGIR 2024 [paper] [code]
  • (ETEGRec) Generative Recommender with End-to-End Learnable Item Tokenization SIGIR 2025 [paper] [code]
  • (COBRA) Sparse Meets Dense: Unified Generative Recommendations with Cascaded Sparse-Dense Representations arXiv 2025. [paper]
  • (MMQ) MMQ: Multimodal Mixture-of-Quantization Tokenization for Semantic ID Generation and User Behavioral Adaptation WSDM 2026 [paper]
  • (UniSID) End-to-End Semantic ID Generation for Generative Advertisement Recommendation arXiv 2026 [paper]
Others
  • (TokenRec) TokenRec: Learning to Tokenize ID for LLM-based Generative Recommendations TKDE 2025 [paper] [code]
  • (BBQRec) BBQRec: Behavior-Bind Quantization for Multi-Modal Sequential Recommendation arXiv 2025. [paper]

🔮 Generation of Next Item IDs

Validity-Aware Generation

Direct Generation (DG)
  • (P5) Recommendation as Language Processing (RLP): A Unified Pretrain, Personalized Prompt & Predict Paradigm (P5). RecSys 2022. [paper] [code]
  • (GenRec) GenRec: Large Language Model for Generative Recommendation. ECIR 2024. [paper] [code]
  • (DEALRec) Data-Efficient Fine-Tuning for LLM-based Recommendation. SIGIR 2024. [paper] [code]
  • (LLM4POI) Large language models for next point-of-interest recommendation. arXiv 2024. [paper]
Closed-Set Generation (CSG)

  • (TALLRec) TALLRec: An Effective and Efficient Tuning Framework to Align Large Language Model with Recommendation. RecSys 2023. [paper] [code]
  • (CLLM4Rec) Collaborative Large Language Model for Recommender Systems. WWW 2024. [paper] [code]
  • (InstructRec) Recommendation as Instruction Following: A Large Language Model Empowered Recommendation Approach. TOIS 2025. [paper]
  • (ContRec) Generative Recommendation with Continuous-Token Diffusion. arXiv 2025. [paper] [code]
Post-Grounding (PG)

  • (SETRec) Order-Agnostic Identifier for Large Language Model-based Generative Recommendation. SIGIR 2025. [paper] [code]
Constrained Decoding (CD)

Decoding Acceleration
